results.title: Bell nozzle — Grokipedia
results.snippet: A Bell nozzle is a convergent-divergent exhaust nozzle used in rocket engines, characterized by its contoured, bell-shaped divergent section that efficiently expands and accelerates high-temperature, high-pressure combustion gases from subsonic speeds at the throat to supersonic velocities at the ex

results.title: Bell nozzle - Wikipedia
results.snippet: The bell or contour shape is designed to impart a large angle expansion for the gases right after the throat. results.title: Design of Rocket Nozzles — Notes for Propulsion
results.snippet: Design of Rocket Nozzles The nozzle is the most important component of the rocket engine. The nozzle converts high pressure, and ideally high temperature, gases into low pressure gases with much higher velocity by changing the cross-sectional area of the flow. results.title: Bell Nozzle Design Using Rao Method | PDF | Nozzle | Rocket - Scribd
results.snippet: A bell-type rocket nozzle consists of three main sections: the convergent section, throat, and divergent section. The convergent section focuses the exhaust flow towards the throat, increasing the gas velocity up to sonic levels.
